free_text: A measurement of the subthreshold neutron fission
cross-section of plutonium-240 in the energy range
All samples were 30 mm in diameter.
The 240Pu sample, 235U sample, an empty dummy sample
and the Au sample (reference for capture measurement)
were cycled automatically in equal intervals
Pu oxide powder (3 g) enclosed in stainless-steel
cans (0.15 mm thick) and then welded in polyethylene
diam., 30 mm thick) located at 120 deg with respect
to the beam direction and ~180 mm from the sample.
The thermal ratio 0.84 assumed as constant
- effect of different fission neutron spectra
RATIO-ERR headings changed and DATA correct
